title: rosa multiflora var. multiflora
intro: Rosa multiflora var. multiflora, also known as the multiflora rose or Japanese rose, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia and is a popular ornamental plant due to its fragrant, white flowers and purple berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa multiflora var. multiflora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Rosa multiflora var. multiflora is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
